task_statement: FINAL architecture next god-module shrink (largest leaf this session). Do NOT move run_adapter_capability_rehome_case itself; it stays in case_runners.py. Add exactly one module_registry.yaml row for the new sibling with support/checkers/lib checker-lib ownership only. Module-level imports for the new sibling: json, os, tempfile, copy, collections.abc Callable/Mapping, pathlib Path, typing Any, and support.checkers.lib.yaml_subset ProfileError. Mutation-RED probes may be recorded as not_proven in sandbox if temp/probe limitations arise, but do not fake them.

nodes.work_statement: Implement only the conservation-ledger leaf extraction: create support/checkers/lib/adapter_capability_checks.py; move exactly the 34 adapter-capability check helpers listed in the ledger from case_runners.py with byte-identical bodies (keep their in-body local imports verbatim); import/re-export all 34 names in case_runners.py; add one module_registry row.
